industry_vertical: Developer tools / local AI agent platform (private, non-commercial)
target_users: Single operator (Douglas) — no multi-tenant or third-party usage
key_features: Floyd Core durable authority daemon (Node 26, node:sqlite)
Cross-surface continuity (CLI + any HTTP surface, pending-ask replay via Last-Event-ID)
Memory injection into builder prompts with evidence (memory.injected)
Versioned skills registry with on-demand @skill loading (skill.loaded receipt, 2 seeded skills)
Permission gate with AgentSpec policy (allow/deny-list + auto-reject for unlisted)
Run management with worktree leases, idempotent submission, route receipts
Gateway auth with private loopback token + 0700 runtime root
Reviewer agent with separate session + mutation invariant
risks: Cockpit donor adoption not yet built — CLI is the only integrated interactive surface
Terminal/PTY, multimedia, and mobile/browser surfaces not started
com.floyd.core launchd service was removed in 2026-07-12 cleanup — no auto-reboot recovery
Cross-volume .supercache symlink: unmounts break governance bootstrap
Gateway token is static (no rotation schedule)
Skills registry seeded with only 2 package skills (code-review@1.0.0, tdd-loop@1.0.0)
No provisioned desktop/web/mobile surface for the live channel yet
Runtime declares Node >=26 but the live host currently executes Node 22.18.0
The official OpenCode SDK adds cross-spawn as a transitive daemon-only dependency; @floyd/sdk remains runtime-dependency-free

_evidence.completion_percentage: Agent code review from 2026-07-12 session: 4 of ~10 planned phases built. 33 unit tests pass (test_exit=0), typecheck clean (typecheck_exit=0). 18 TS source files across 3 packages: 16 core/daemon/src/*.ts, 1 clients/cli/src/main.ts, 1 packages/contracts/src/index.ts. Not-yet-built: cockpit, PTY, multimedia, mobile surfaces.

_evidence.complexity_score: 6/10: Floyd Core daemon + HTTP session channel + SQLite + OpenCode engine integration + governance layer + memory/skills subsystems + reviewer pipeline. Integrated but bounded to single-user local.
_evidence.team_size_minimum: 2: one builder agent + one reviewer agent (current workflow design). Single operator possible but reviewer is CI-critical.
